statement: In every magma, Equation 3429 (`x * y = z * (z * (w * u))`) implies Equation 3836 (`x * y = (z * w) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0611
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op z (op w u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op x x))
